FinalizarRutina(Guid)

Closes a routine by setting its Hasta field to the current date-time. Called when creating a new routine for a client who already has one active.

public void FinalizarRutina(Guid rutinaId)

Parameters

rutinaId Guid

The routine to finalize.

GetActivaByCliente(Guid)

Retrieves the currently active (open-ended) routine for a client. A routine is active when its Hasta field is null.

public Rutina GetActivaByCliente(Guid clienteId)

Parameters

clienteId Guid

The client to look up.

Returns

Rutina

The active Rutina, or null if the client has no active routine.
